issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for each step.

scenarios.name: Command vs event IPC for file read + CPU stream
scenarios.rationale: Baseline collapsed both flows into commands and skipped Result<T, String> conventions, while treatment correctly used #[tauri::command] with invoke() for the on-demand read and Tauri events for the push-style CPU stream.

scenarios.name: Lock down filesystem access to one directory
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gave generic Tauri allowlist advice without the capabilities/ structure, whereas treatment scoped @tauri-apps/plugin-fs in capabilities/ with a narrow path list following least-privilege.
